name: Stripe Agent Toolkit
pricing_notes: Toolkit free; Stripe API fees apply per transaction (2.9% + 30¢)

auth.notes: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY; toolkit wraps Stripe SDK and exposes as LLM tools

performance.notes: Stripe API latency; toolkit overhead minimal

agent_readiness.notes: Official Stripe toolkit for LLM agents. Exposes Stripe operations as tools: create payment links, customers, subscriptions, invoices. Integrates with LangChain, Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI Assistants. MCP server available. Sandbox mode for testing.

gotchas: Agents with payment creation capabilities require careful trust boundaries
TypeScript/JavaScript primary (Python support via Stripe MCP server)
Sandbox mode critical for testing — real keys can create actual charges
Tool permissions must be scoped carefully (don't give agents full Stripe access)
best_when: AI-powered e-commerce or SaaS billing agents
Customer service agents that need to create invoices or manage subscriptions
Sales automation agents generating payment links
Building Stripe-integrated AI workflows in LangChain or Vercel AI SDK
avoid_when: Fully autonomous agents without human oversight (payment risk)
Simple payment integrations that don't need LLM control
summary: Stripe's official Agent Toolkit packages Stripe operations as LLM-callable tools for AI agents. Covers payment links, customers, subscriptions, and invoices. Integrates with LangChain, Vercel AI SDK, and OpenAI Assistants natively. MCP server available. Excellent developer experience with sandbox mode and proper idempotency. Security-conscious teams must carefully scope agent permissions.
